lines.en: Tom, it is time to do some chores.
OK, Mom. What do you want me to do?
lines.zh: 好的，妈妈。你想让我做什么？

lines.en: Can you sweep the floor in the living room?
lines.zh: 你能扫一下客厅的地吗？

lines.en: Sure. I will do it right now.
After that, can you take out the trash?
lines.zh: 扫完之后，你能倒一下垃圾吗？

lines.en: No problem. I will do both.
Thank you. I am cleaning the kitchen.
Mom, where should I put the trash bag?
There is a big bin outside the door.
Got it. We make a great team, Mom!
lines.zh: 明白了。我们配合得很好，妈妈！
